subject: civic
topic_title: Roles of Individuals and Government in Maintaining Traffic Regulations
learning_objectives: Identify the roles of individuals in maintaining traffic regulations
Explain the roles of government agencies in traffic regulation
Discuss how government policies and enforcement promote road safety

sections.heading: Roles of Individuals
sections.content: Individuals should obey traffic rules, respect road signs, obey traffic authorities, avoid damaging roads and road signs, avoid selling on highways, and help maintain order during traffic congestion.

sections.heading: Roles of Government Agencies
sections.content: Government agencies such as FRSC, VIO, the police, NSCDC, and LASTMA help enforce traffic regulations, inspect vehicles, control traffic, and educate the public on proper road use.

sections.heading: Other Roles of Government
sections.content: Government builds roads, installs road signs and traffic lights, funds traffic agencies, punishes offenders, enacts traffic laws, and carries out public enlightenment campaigns on traffic safety.
